entity.name: Barings
entity.description: Barings’ dedicated emerging markets team manages over $7 billion in assets across corporates, sovereign, local debt and blended strategies. An integrated team of 19 seasoned portfolio managers, analysts and traders analyses the sovereign debt of over 75 countries and the corporate debt of over 600 companies.
entity.website_content:
[Skip to Content (press ENTER)](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual#mainSection)
Barings has observed a rise in the creation of fraudulent websites, fake WhatsApp accounts and AI-generated voicemails impersonating our employees. Barings does not conduct business on messaging applications like WhatsApp. Our web presence is solely located within the barings.com domain; if you are directed to a website that is not hosted on this domain, the site is fraudulent.
Close

* [About](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual)
About
About
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/navigation-top/about/who-we-are.jpg?t=20211208051947)
Who We Are
A global alternative asset manager with expertise across credit, real assets, capital solutions and emerging markets.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/who-we-are)
History
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/navigation-top/about/history.jpg?t=20211208051947)
Our History
Throughout history, Barings has been a leader in providing global, innovative, diversified solutions to clients. This mission continues to drive the firm today.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/our-history)
Leadership
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/navigation-top/about/our-leadership.jpg?t=20211208051947)
Our Leadership
Grounded in shared values and a team-based culture, we strive to improve everyday—to innovate, to adapt, and to evolve in service to our clients.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/our-leadership)
Careers
[I Am A Professional](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/careers/professional)
[I Am A Student](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/careers/student)
[Inclusion & Experience](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/careers/inclusion-experience)
Industry Partnerships & Events
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/about/industry-partnerships--events/industry-partnerships-events.jpg?t=20250401085601)
Industry Partnerships & Events
Our industry collaborations and exclusive events foster thought leadership, innovation, and lasting relationships.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/about/industry-partnerships)
* [Strategies](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual)
Strategies
Public Fixed Income
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/navigation-top/strategies/public-fixed-income.jpg?t=20211208052256)
Public Fixed Income
Our broad capabilities allow us to go beyond traditional fixed income strategies and access investments spanning the quality, yield and liquidity spectrum.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-fixed-income)
Asset Class
[Global High Yield & CLOs](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-fixed-income/high-yield) [Emerging Markets Debt](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-fixed-income/emerging-markets-debt) [Investment Grade](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-fixed-income/investment-grade)
Public Equities
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/public-equities/public-equities.jpg?t=20211208052817)
Public Equities
Our experienced team constructs growth at reasonable price portfolios (GARP), utilizing bottom-up research in an effort to identify attractive investment opportunities over a long-term horizon. ESG integration, assessing risk and identifying positive change is core to our process.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-equities)
Asset Class
[Emerging Markets Equity](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-equities/emerging-markets-equity) [Small & Mid Cap Equity](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-equities/small-and-mid-cap-equity) [Global & International Equities](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/public-equities/global-and-international-equities)
Private Credit
![](https://www.barings.com/contentassets/947be6cb1870493fbfb00572ebef8e08/private-credit.jpg?t=20260302061559)
Private Credit
Our global presence and longstanding expertise allows us to evaluate and capture the yield potential of illiquid and less liquid credit-based investments.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-credit)
Asset Class
[Global Direct Lending](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-credit/global-direct-lending) [Capital Solutions](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-credit/capital-solutions) [Global Infrastructure](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-credit/global-infrastructure) [Corporate Private Placements](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-credit/private-placements)
Asset-Based Solutions
![A close-up view of a glass facade of a modern skyscraper. The reflective glass panels create a complex pattern of lines and reflections.](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/asset-based-solutions/asset-based-solutions.jpeg?t=20260205042447)
Asset-Based Solutions
Our platform combines global origination capabilities with deep public and private market expertise to capture relative value and deliver compelling risk-adjusted returns.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/asset-based-solutions)
Portfolio Finance
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/portfolio-finance/portfolio-finance.jpg?t=20240124093748)
Portfolio Finance
We directly originate secured portfolio financings through our relationships with asset managers. As credit investors, we are focused on capital preservation, enabling us to deliver the potential for consistent, strong relative value over time.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/portfolio-finance)
Real Estate
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/real-estate/real-estate.jpg?t=20211208052911)
Real Estate
Our team secures access to investments across the risk spectrum and around the globe, applying an active management approach designed to maximize each asset's potential.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/real-estate)
Asset Class
[Global Real Estate Debt](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/real-estate/real-estate-debt) [Global Real Estate Equity](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/real-estate/real-estate-equity)
Private Equity
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/private-equity/private-equity.jpg?t=20251009074712)
Private Equity
Our experienced team seeks differentiated sources of return across private equity, real assets and asset-based investments.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-equity)
Asset Class
[Private Equity Solutions](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/private-equity/private-equity-solutions)
Insurance Solutions
![](https://www.barings.com/globalassets/2-assets/strategies/insurance-solutions/insurance-solutions.jpg?t=20211208052416)
Insurance Solutions
Barings’ Insurance Solutions group develops customized solutions leveraging the firm’s experience and capabilities across public and private asset classes.
[Learn More](https://www.barings.com/en-us/individual/strategies/insurance-solutions)

Financing Solutions

With over 300 global investment professionals, we provide access to local networks, a flexible capital base and solutions across a range of private asset classes.

tavily.answer:
Barings LLC's official website is www.barings.com. Barings is a global alternative investment management firm. It operates as a subsidiary of MassMutual Financial Group.
Barings is a $481 billion global alternative asset manager based in Charlotte, North Carolina, with 1,001-5,000 employees. It focuses on fixed income, real estate, and other financial services. Founded as a subsidiary of MassMutual, it raised $300 million in post-IPO debt in 2025.
Barings is a global alternative asset manager with $481 billion in assets. Founded in 2016, it focuses on credit, real assets, and capital solutions. The firm is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.
Barings is a global alternative asset manager; Wellfound is a platform for recruiting startups; Barings does not use WhatsApp for business.
Barings BDC invests in senior secured private debt in middle-market businesses. It focuses on loans with terms of five to seven years. Barings BDC is managed by Barings LLC, a global investment manager.

errors: Investor does not appear to invest in Africa.
